title: Clear Latex Balloons with Red Heart Confetti (40cm) Pack of 5 - Perfect for Romantic Celebrations and Events
features: CLEAR LATEX BALLOONS: Featuring high-quality, transparent latex material, these 40cm balloons provide the perfect canvas for showcasing the beautiful red heart confetti inside - adding a romantic touch to any event.

RED HEART CONFETTI: Each balloon is filled with eye-catching red heart confetti, providing an enchanting visual effect that will captivate your guests and make your celebration even more special and memorable.

PACK OF 5: With five balloons in each pack, you'll have an ample supply to create a stunning display for your romantic occasion - whether it's an anniversary, wedding, proposal, or Valentine's Day celebration.

EASY TO USE: Inflate these balloons with air or helium for endless decorating possibilities - create a gorgeous balloon bouquet, arrange them as a centerpiece, or scatter them around your event space for extra flair.

PERFECT FOR ROMATIC CELEBRATIONS: Designed to enhance the atmosphere of love and romance, these clear latex balloons with red heart confetti are the ideal choice for making your special occasion unforgettable.
description: Product Description This cute classic balloon is designed with a lovely colour and would make a stunning addition to any balloon design! Celebrate with a bang! Box Contains 1 x Pack of 5 Red and Pink Heart Valentine Confetti Balloons
